title: Aigostar Smart Electric WiFi Glass Panel Heater 2000W - Rapid Whole-Room Heating with Alexa/App Control, Ultra-Quiet, Wall or Floor Use, Energy Saving ECO Mode & Programmable Timer - Helen Smart Black
features: 【2000W High-Intensity Heating for Large Spaces】 - Command powerful, whole-room warmth with our advanced 2000W heating system. Engineered for rapid temperature rise in offices, living rooms, or larger areas, it eliminates cold spots efficiently—delivering consistent, inviting heat exactly when and where you need it most

【7-Day Smart Scheduling with Alexa & App Control】 - Manage your climate remotely via the AIGOSMART app, setting a 24/7 heating schedule up to a week in advance. Use geo-fencing to pre-warm rooms before you arrive, or simply ask Alexa or Google Assistant—true hands-free comfort tailored to your lifestyle

【Intelligent ECO Mode: Auto-Adjusts from 2000W to 1000W】 - Optimize energy use without compromising warmth. The smart ECO mode dynamically shifts power between 2000W and 1000W based on room conditions, maintaining ideal temperatures while reducing energy consumption—and your monthly bills

【Elegant Tempered Glass & Triple Safety System】 - Designed to complement any interior, the sleek glass front houses robust protection: child lock, overheat auto-shutoff, and tip-over protection. Safety meets style for worry-free operation in homes with children or pets

【IPX4 Bathroom-Safe with Adjustable LED Display】 - Use with confidence in moisture-prone spaces like bathrooms thanks to the IPX4 waterproof rating. The clear LED screen features adjustable brightness for day or night viewing, ensuring easy control in any environment or lighting
description: Product Description Effective Heating With 2000W high power, quickly heats a room with a maximum area of ​​20㎡. Easy Touch Control Long press + or - to adjust temperature quickly, and the brightness can be adjustable to reduce impact on sleeping. 24 Hours Timer Quiet operation, ideal for bedrooms, offices, or study rooms; 1- to 24-hour shut-off timer for efficient use. Child Lock Mode Press + & - for 3s to open child lock function to prevent accidents(when in child lock mode from App, the touchscreen can't be controlled)
